title: Hemionitis formosana
taxonomy: Hemionitis formosana is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Hemionitis, which is a group of ferns native to tropical and subtropical regions. The family Dryopteridaceae is a large and diverse group of ferns commonly known as the wood ferns or shield ferns. The classification of Hemionitis formosana reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns in the same family. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of this specific species.
uses: Hemionitis formosana is known to be used in traditional medicine in Taiwan.
